name: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access -- @1.3
fullName: Delete Eco News: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access

steps.name: When I send request to delete eco news with id "2"
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message should be Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2
